chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Cr. Bail Appl. No. S- 246 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 21.03.2025 For orders on office objections For hearing of main case Mr. Ayatullah Khowaja, Advocate for Applicant Mr. Siraj Ahmed Bijarani, A.P.G. along with I.O Applicant Afzal Ahmed seeks post-arrest bail in FIR No. 06 of 2024 registered at police station ACE Hyderabad for offence punishable under Sections 161, 166, 167, 217, 218, 417, 420, 34 PPC r/w Section 5 PCA 1947. Learned counsel submits that the allegations leveled against the applicant in the FIR are false, that the alleged offence has not occurred and the applicant has been implicated on the basis of false and fabricated facts; that there is unexplained delay in lodgment of the FIR; that challan has been submitted and the applicant is no more required for further investigation; that the main accused as well as other co-accused have been granted bail; therefore, following the rule of consistency, the applicant may also be enlarged on bail. Learned APG present along with I.O has not disputed that the main accused as well as co-accused have been granted; however, he raised objection to the grant of bail to the applicant on the ground that he issued revised NOC for sale and advertisement. Since the main accused has been granted bail and all other co-accused have also been granted bail; therefore, following the principle of rule of consistency the applicant is also admitted to bail subject to his furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.1,00,000/- (One Lac) and PR bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of Trial Court.

JUDGE karar_hussain/PS*
